designEditor.createFirstDesign: Create your first loyalty card design
designEditor.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this card design?

pages.updateActiveDescription: This will automatically update all of your customers' cards to reflect this design.
pages.savedActive: Design saved! Your customers' cards will update shortly.

cardBack.addFieldsHint: Add terms, contact info, or other details

editor.activateConfirm: Activate this design? All customers will receive the updated card.
editor.stripsGenerating: Stamp images are still being generated. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
editor.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields (Name, Description)
editor.organizationTooltip: Optional title shown at the top of the pass
editor.cardDescriptionTooltip: On Apple Wallet, shown as the title on the info page. On Google Wallet, shown as the card header.
editor.logoHint: Appears in top-left of pass. PNG, 160x50pt max
editor.backgroundTooltip: Main background of your wallet pass
editor.labelTooltip: Color for labels like 'STAMPS' and 'REWARD'. Apple Wallet only — Google Wallet uses its own text colors.
editor.lowContrastLabel: Low contrast — labels may be hard to read on this background.
editor.textTooltip: Color for stamps count and main text. Apple Wallet only — Google Wallet uses its own text colors.
editor.lowContrastText: Low contrast — text may be hard to read on this background.
editor.totalStampsTooltip: Stamps needed to earn the reward (2-20)
editor.stampIconTooltip: Icon shown inside each filled stamp
editor.rewardIconTooltip: Special icon for the final stamp (the reward)
editor.iconColorTooltip: Color for icons inside filled stamps
editor.emptyStampTooltip: Color for empty stamp circles (unfilled stamps)
editor.stampBorderTooltip: Border color for empty stamp circles
editor.stripBackgroundTooltip: Optional pattern or texture displayed behind the stamps
editor.contentDescription: On Apple Wallet, these appear below the stamps. On Google Wallet, they appear above the QR code.
editor.backSectionSubtitle: Information on the back of the card
editor.backDescription: Information shown when the customer taps the pass. On Apple Wallet, these appear on the back of the card. On Google Wallet, they appear in the details section.
editor.noBusinessInfo: Add business info in Settings to show it on all cards.
editor.businessInfoExplanation: Business information is pulled from your account settings.
editor.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave this page.
